mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAVORITE_PRODUCTS ( fav_no, usr_type, usr_no, prod_no, reg_dt ) VALUES ( SEQ_FAVORITE_PRODUCTS.NEXTVAL, #{usrType}, #{usrNo}, #{productId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT p.prod_no AS productId, p.prod_nm AS productName, p.prod_type AS productType, p.tgt_lrg AS targetLarge, p.tgt_dtl AS targetDetail, p.prod_desc AS productDesc, p.rate_cat AS rateCategory, p.min_prd_mon AS minPeriodMonth, p.max_prd_mon AS maxPeriodMonth, p.min_amt AS minAmount, p.max_amt AS maxAmount, NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS minRate, NVL(MAX(NVL(r.mtr_rate, r.base_rate) + NVL(r.pref_rate, 0)), 0) AS maxRate FROM FAVORITE_PRODUCTS f JOIN PRODUCTS p ON f.prod_no = p.prod_no LEFT JOIN INTEREST_RATES r ON p.prod_no = r.prod_no AND r.is_active = 'Y' WHERE f.usr_type = #{usrType} AND f.usr_no = #{usrNo} AND p.active = 'Y' GROUP BY p.prod_no, p.prod_nm, p.prod_type, p.tgt_lrg, p.tgt_dtl, p.prod_desc, p.rate_cat, p.min_prd_mon, p.max_prd_mon, p.min_amt, p.max_amt, f.reg_dt ORDER BY f.reg_dt DESC
